name_en: Genuine factory-made, authentic quality. We ensure all materials, hardware, stitching, and edges meet 100% authentic raw materials.
name_cn:
Genuine factory-made, authentic quality. We ensure all materials, hardware, stitching, and edges meet 100% authentic raw materials.
Mini BOOK TOTE Handbag
Rose Pink Oblique Print
This Book Tote handbag is interpreted by Maria Grazia Chiuri and is a classic piece that embodies the Dior spirit.
Fully decorated with Dior's iconic Rose Pink Oblique print.
The mini style highlights Dior's exquisite craftsmanship, can be carried by hand, and can also be paired with other Oblique print items.
Front decorated with "CHRISTIAN DIOR" logo
Dimensions: 22.5 x 24 x 8 cm
Mini Tote
Mini Pink D
Mini Pink D
Mini Handbag
